meta.title: Lankawa — Sri Lanka's Civic Intelligence Platform
meta.description: One platform for the island. Economy, districts, elections, disasters, and public services — with provenance on every number. Built for Sri Lankans, by Sri Lankans.
meta.districtDescription: {name} district in {province} province. Population {population}. Civic data on Lankawa.
meta.provinceDescription: {name} province — {count} districts with aggregated population, area, and election summaries.
meta.electionPresidentialDescription: 2024 presidential election first-preference results for {name} district.
meta.electionParliamentaryDescription: 2024 parliamentary election seat allocation for {name} electoral district.

home.title: Your morning check for Sri Lanka
home.subtitle: FX, fuel, weather, and power — with provenance on every number.
home.pulseSubtitle: What matters this morning — refreshed on a public cadence.
home.modulesSubtitle: Jump into the modules that matter most — districts, elections, economy, and more.

home.exploreCtaSubtitle: The full Lankawa module directory — elections, budget, Ardeno stack, transport, and platform tools.
home.ardenoSubtitle: Fuel, property, vehicles, and food — integrated in-platform from sister platforms.
home.disclaimer: Aggregated from public sources. Not an official government publication.
home.aqiStripHonesty: Open-Meteo model grid near Colombo — not a DMC/CEA station reading. Units μg/m³ except AQI.

news.title: Sri Lanka news pulse
news.subtitle: Latest headlines from public Sinhala, Tamil, and English RSS feeds.
news.pageSubtitle: Story clusters and headlines from public Sinhala, Tamil, and English RSS feeds.
news.clustersSubtitle: Same story across outlets, ranked by agreement.
news.feedHealthSubtitle: Per-outlet fetch status from the latest poll.
news.topicRailsSubtitle: Cluster topics you can open or cite.

shareMorning.title: Lankawa morning check
shareMorning.hint: Uses your share sheet when available, otherwise copies text.
shareMorning.error: Could not share. Try copying from the page.

shareDistrict.hint: Share sheet or copy for WhatsApp / village groups.
shareDistrict.error: Could not share. Try copying from the page.
shareDistrict.footer: Source: Lankawa — not an official government publication.

brief.title: What to know this morning
brief.subtitle: A compact brief generated from the latest Sri Lanka headlines.
brief.translationNote: Sinhala and Tamil views use translated interface strings. Heuristic briefs may keep source headlines in English unless an AI provider is configured.
brief.factLedgerNote: Pulse ledger from live civic sources — separate from news bullets.

cricket.subtitle: Shown when a Sri Lanka match is live, upcoming today, or finished within 24 hours.
cricket.resultWindow: Shown for 24 hours after the match window.
cricket.economySubtitle: Live, upcoming today, or a result within the last 24 hours.

districts.title: District Atlas
districts.subtitle: Sri Lanka's 25 districts as the universal geographic key for civic data.
districts.relatedElectionsDesc: 2024 presidential vote breakdown for this district
districts.relatedDisasterStations: {count} flood monitoring stations in this district
districts.relatedEconomyDesc: Exchange rates, fuel prices, and macro indicators
districts.liveFloodNone: No river monitoring stations mapped to this district.
districts.liveFloodUnavailable: Stations mapped but live readings are temporarily unavailable.
districts.relatedProvinceDesc: Aggregated stats and districts in this province
districts.relatedHealthDesc: Weekly dengue statistics for this district
districts.relatedPropertyDesc: Median land price bands for this district
districts.relatedTransportDesc: Bus routes, railway stations, and airports
districts.relatedCostOfLivingDesc: District index with fuel, property, and food basket
districts.pressEmpty: No recent headlines mention this district.
districts.pressHonesty: Keyword match against public RSS titles — not a full media monitor.

census.title: Census 2024 footnote
census.honesty: Stale-OK population context from curated DCS/HDX tables — not a live census API.

marine.title: Marine swell
marine.subtitle: Nearshore wave height for this coastal district (Open-Meteo marine or seed).
marine.honesty: Not a Met Dept or Navy warning.

provinces.title: Provinces
provinces.subtitle: Sri Lanka's 9 provinces — aggregated districts, population, and election summaries.
provinces.relatedPropertyDesc: District land price bands in this province
provinces.relatedLocalGovDesc: Search MC, UC, and PS bodies by district
provinces.pulseSubtitle: Best-effort aggregate across districts in this province.

elections.title: Presidential Election 2024
elections.subtitle: District-level first-preference results from the Election Commission of Sri Lanka.
elections.parliamentarySubtitle: District-level seat allocations from the Election Commission of Sri Lanka.
elections.historySubtitle: Explore presidential cycles from 2010 to 2024 with swing charts.

nightMode.offBody: Enable for a louder banner and reminder to refresh during live counting.
nightMode.onBody: Refresh this page periodically. Cadence honesty: results here are still the published seed ledger until a live EC feed lands.
nightMode.honesty: Not a live Election Commission feed. Manual refresh only — no auto-polling.

swing.title: Electoral swing (2019 → 2024)
swing.subtitle: Presidential first-preference share change between the prior cycle and 2024.

vanni.title: Vanni electoral crosswalk
vanni.body: Sri Lanka uses separate administrative and electoral district boundaries. Four Northern administrative districts — Kilinochchi, Mannar, Mullaitivu, and Vavuniya — are aggregated into a single Vanni electoral district for parliamentary elections and some presidential reporting.
vanni.districtNote: Presidential results shown here reflect the combined Vanni electoral district tally published by the Election Commission, not an independent count for this administrative district alone.

flood.historySubtitle: Recent water-level readings for mapped river stations in this district.

disaster.title: Disaster & Flood
disaster.subtitle: Flood monitoring, CEB and LECO power notices, and DMC bulletins aggregated on Lankawa.
disaster.floodSubtitle: River station alert levels from the public flood API.
disaster.powerSubtitle: CEB Care national schedule/outages beside LECO Western/coastal interruption notices.
disaster.lecoNoAffectedAreas: No current-month LECO interruptions parsed for sampled branches.
disaster.lecoSeed: Seed / unknown — LECO scrape failed; not a claim of clear supply.
disaster.lecoHonesty: LECO covers Western coastal branches only. Scheduled notices are scraped from leco.lk — verify with LECO 1910 before acting.
disaster.powerNoAffectedAreas: No affected areas reported in the latest CEB Care check.
disaster.powerSourceNote: Source: CEB Care demand-management schedule and present-outage map (cebcare.ceb.lk).
disaster.concentrationSubtitle: Heuristic mention counts from CEB and LECO affected-area labels — not an official feeder map.
disaster.concentrationEmpty: No district names matched in the latest affected-area labels.
disaster.concentrationHonesty: District scores are string-match heuristics on area labels. Missing a district does not mean clear supply.
disaster.dmcSubtitle: Latest Disaster Management Centre headlines from the public RSS feed.
disaster.dmcEmpty: No DMC RSS headlines available right now.
disaster.dmcHonesty: Headlines only — verify the linked DMC bulletin before acting.
disaster.metSubtitle: Weather warnings and advisories from the Department of Meteorology public dashboard.
disaster.metUnavailableBody: The Met Department advisory feed could not be reached right now.
disaster.metEmptyBody: The public advisory dashboard reports no active weather warnings for today.
disaster.metActiveCount: {count, plural, one {# active advisory} other {# active advisories}}
disaster.metFeedCapOnly: Showing published CAP alerts (advisory dashboard empty).
disaster.metFeedEnriched: Advisory rows enriched with CAP urgency/severity fields.
disaster.metHonesty: Live Met Dept feeds only — Lankawa never fills this panel with curated seed warnings. Unavailable means the advisory API could not be reached; empty means the dashboard reports no active hazards.
disaster.metSourceNote: Source: Department of Meteorology Weather Advisory System (was.meteo.gov.lk).
disaster.earthquakeSubtitle: USGS catalog entries within Sri Lanka's land area — shown without severity scoring.
disaster.earthquakeEmptyBody: USGS reports no magnitude {minMagnitude}+ events inside Sri Lanka's land bounding box in the last {days} days.
disaster.earthquakeEmptyScopeNote: Monitoring box: {minLat}°N–{maxLat}°N, {minLon}°E–{maxLon}°E (same bounds as the district map).
disaster.earthquakeEmptyOffshoreNote: Offshore Indian Ocean events outside this land box are not listed here.
disaster.earthquakeErrorBody: The USGS Event API could not be reached. Lankawa is not showing cached or estimated earthquake data.
disaster.earthquakeSourceNote: Source: USGS FDSN Event Web Service (earthquake.usgs.gov).
disaster.earthquakeCountLabel: {count, plural, one {# event in window} other {# events in window}}
disaster.landslideSubtitle: NBRO/DMC early-warning context for highland districts — morning-sized, not an evacuation map.
disaster.landslideHonesty: Not an official evacuation order. Verify the latest NBRO/DMC PDF before acting. Lankawa is a civic republish of public bulletin layout — not the NBRO Early Warning app.
disaster.landslideHonestySeed: District watch/warning counts below are a curated Lankawa seed overlay, not live NBRO/DMC tiers. The latest bulletin tip could not be laid out into districts — open the PDF link before acting.
disaster.landslideNoneActive: No watch/warning districts in the latest tip bulletin parse.
disaster.landslideNoneActiveSeed: No watch/warning districts in the seed overlay.
disaster.mapSubtitle: Multi-layer situational awareness — monochrome fill intensity shows attention, not official colour codes. Click a district for detail.
disaster.mapLegendLandslide: Brighter fills = watch/warning attention from the tip bulletin parse, or the seed overlay when tip layout is unavailable.
disaster.mapLegendFlood: National flood alert context — open district pages for station detail.
disaster.mapLegendMulti: District fill = max of flood station alerts and landslide watch/warning. Pins: GFM extent, FIRMS fires, GDACS events, irrigation gauges.
disaster.hazardSubtitle: NASA FIRMS fire pins over Sri Lanka and GDACS multi-hazard events in the wider Indian Ocean / South Asia window.
disaster.firesEmpty: No VIIRS fire detections in the Sri Lanka land box for the lookback window.
disaster.firesNeedsKey: Set NASA_FIRMS_MAP_KEY to enable live FIRMS CSV pulls. Empty pins are shown until then — not a claim of zero fire risk.
disaster.gdacsEmpty: No GDACS events in the regional window right now.

cyclone.title: Cyclone watch (JTWC / GDACS)
cyclone.subtitle: Tropical cyclone events in the Indian Ocean / South Asia window.
cyclone.empty: Basin quiet — no active tropical cyclone events in the GDACS window.
cyclone.active: Active cyclone / tropical storm signals in the regional window.
cyclone.honesty: Seasonal watch from GDACS TC events. Not a Met Dept cyclone warning — verify official bulletins.

glofas.title: GloFAS basin discharge
glofas.subtitle: Open-Meteo Flood simulated river discharge near major basin centroids.
glofas.empty: No basin discharge series available right now.
glofas.honesty: Complements local river gauges — not an official DMC flood warning.

irrigation.title: Irrigation river gauges
irrigation.subtitle: Latest public Irrigation Department ArcGIS readings for major river stations.
irrigation.empty: No gauge readings available right now.
irrigation.honesty: Civic republish of Irrigation ArcGIS — not an official DMC flood warning.

disaster.mapLegendGfm: White pins mark seed GFM / flood-extent attention points — pins only, not mosaics.
disaster.mapGfmHonesty: {count} seed pins as of {date}. Not a DMC inundation map.

homeHazard.title: Hazard signal near {district}
homeHazard.fires: {count, plural, one {# nearby FIRMS fire pin} other {# nearby FIRMS fire pins}}
homeHazard.honesty: Not an official evacuation order. FIRMS pins are satellite detections; landslide tiers are a civic overlay.

economy.title: Economic Pulse
economy.subtitle: Exchange rates, fuel prices, and macro indicators.
economy.macroSubtitle: Static seed from CBSL public figures
economy.fuelRevisionsSubtitle: Official petrol 92 and auto diesel price changes from the Octane partner API.

lpg.title: Cylinder prices
lpg.subtitle: Colombo 12.5 kg refill reference — filter other districts below
lpg.emptyDistrict: No 12.5 kg prices for this district

householdEnergy.title: Household energy at a glance
householdEnergy.subtitle: Fuel, Colombo LPG 12.5 kg, and an indicative electricity bill teaser.
householdEnergy.tariffTeaser: Indicative domestic bill at 90 kWh/month from PUCSL slabs.

remittance.title: Remittance calculator
remittance.subtitle: Convert using the latest CBSL USD/LKR buy and sell rates shown above — not the bank TT board.
remittance.fallback: Cached CBSL band — live fetch unavailable.
remittance.usdAmount: USD amount to convert to LKR
remittance.lkrAmount: LKR amount to convert to USD
remittance.disclaimer: Indicative CBSL exchange rates only. These are not remittance corridor quotes, bank fees, transfer fees, or guaranteed settlement rates.

cse.title: Colombo Stock Exchange
cse.subtitle: ASPI, S&P SL20, sectors, most active, and foreign participation from the public CSE board
cse.moversSubtitle: Top gainers and losers from the public CSE board — ticker, last, and % change.
cse.moversHonesty: Prefers dedicated topGainers / topLooses; falls back to tradeSummary sort, then seed. Not investment advice.
cse.fallbackNote: Live CSE data is temporarily unavailable. Showing the latest cached snapshot.
cse.announcementsSubtitle: Halt banners and recent approved disclosures from the public CSE board.
cse.announcementsHonesty: Live when GET /notifications or approvedAnnouncement responds; otherwise a short seed strip. Not investment advice.

debt.title: Foreign debt composition
debt.subtitle: Commercial vs concessionary share of external debt — a Lankawa pulse normalized from public CBSL tables (via Watchdog databank discovery).
debt.methodology: Primary figures from Central Bank reports. Historical only — not post-restructuring live debt. Not an official CBSL dashboard.

economy.householdSubtitle: Official inflation, domestic electricity tariffs, and NWSDB water bill bands — kitchen-table utility numbers.

ncpi.title: NCPI inflation
ncpi.subtitle: National Consumer Price Index from the Department of Census and Statistics — monthly official series, not Lankawa COL.
ncpi.honesty: Monthly official series with a period label. Not live inflation. Not the Lankawa cost-of-living composite.

tariff.title: Electricity tariff (domestic)
tariff.subtitle: PUCSL-approved residential energy and fixed charges by consumption block.
tariff.honesty: Indicative only — progressive slabs and fixed charges can change with PUCSL decisions. Not your CEB/LECO bill; verify against the latest decision and your meter reading.

waterTariff.title: Water bill (NWSDB domestic)
waterTariff.subtitle: Gazette water tariff slabs for domestic and Samurdhi/tenement connections — indicative monthly estimate with VAT.
waterTariff.honesty: Indicative only — progressive m³ slabs, monthly service charge for the consumption band, and 18% VAT on usage+service. Assumes a 30-day billing period for Domestic (Category 10). Not your NWSDB bill; sewerage, arrears, and other charges are excluded. Verify against the official Bill Calculator and your meter reading.
waterTariff.liveMatch: Live BillCalculator totals match seed for these units

worldPump.title: Regional pump compare
worldPump.subtitle: Sri Lanka petrol 92 vs curated South/Southeast Asia retail peers (USD/L).

remittanceBoard.title: Bank TT remittance board
remittanceBoard.subtitle: Indicative USD→LKR telegraphic-transfer style bands from major banks — compare beside the CBSL calculator.
remittanceBoard.seed: Full seed board — all live bank FX fetches failed.
remittanceBoard.honesty: Public indicative only. Lankawa is not affiliated with these banks. Fees, corridors, and same-day TT products differ. Not CBSL official rates.
remittanceBoard.metricsLabel: Best TT buy and sell highlights

depositRates.title: Bank FD rates
depositRates.subtitle: Indicative LKR fixed-deposit maturity rates at common tenors — compare public bank quotes.
depositRates.seed: Full seed board — all live bank FD fetches failed.
depositRates.honesty: Public indicative only. Lankawa is not affiliated with these banks. Not deposit advice — confirm rates, AER, and terms on the bank site before placing funds.
depositRates.tableLabel: Bank fixed deposit maturity rates by tenor

treasury.title: CBSL T-bill / WAYR
treasury.subtitle: Latest auction yields — stale-OK seed until live PDF ingest.
treasury.seed: Seed snapshot — not a live CBSL scrape

paymentsBulletin.title: Digital payments pulse
paymentsBulletin.subtitle: CEFTS / JustPay / LANKAQR from CBSL Payments Bulletin — {period}.
paymentsBulletin.merchantsNote: Registered stickers — not active monthly usage
paymentsBulletin.seed: Quarterly seed — not a live scrape
paymentsBulletin.honesty: PDF extract only. Prefer CBSL tables over LankaPay marketing counters. Not a payment-rails dashboard.

marketsPress.title: Markets in the press
marketsPress.subtitle: Headlines from Lanka Business Online and Ada Derana Biz RSS.
marketsPress.empty: No market press headlines available right now.
marketsPress.honesty: Aggregated from public RSS — not Lankawa analysis.

generationMix.title: Generation mix
generationMix.subtitle: Indicative hydro / thermal / renewable shares under the tariff card.
generationMix.honesty: Not a live SCADA feed — verify against the latest PUCSL/CEB digest.

macroObs.title: Macro observations
macroObs.subtitle: Inflation and reserves strip — seed until live CBSL observations land.
macroObs.honesty: Cron persists these into observations when the database is configured.

policyRates.title: CBSL policy rates
policyRates.subtitle: Overnight Policy Rate with SDFR/SLFR corridor — not bank deposit quotes.
policyRates.honesty: Since 27 Nov 2024 CBSL sets a single OPR; SDFR/SLFR are a published corridor only. Not deposit or lending advice.

marketFx.title: Market mid USD/LKR
marketFx.subtitle: Community mid rate — CBSL buy/sell remains the official band.
marketFx.honesty: Unofficial market mid from fawazahmed0 currency-api — not CBSL.

worldBank.title: World Bank macro
worldBank.subtitle: WDI GDP growth, CPI, and population for Sri Lanka.
worldBank.honesty: World Bank WDI — not CBSL official; complements seed macro.

cryptoCorridor.title: BTC → LKR corridor
cryptoCorridor.subtitle: Indicative CoinGecko mid — remittance context only.
cryptoCorridor.honesty: Not a remittance product, not CBSL, not investment advice.

services.title: Public Services
services.subtitle: Hospitals, MOH offices, police stations, schools, and GN offices by district.
services.dsSearchNone: No DS divisions matched — try Homagama, Negombo, or Jaffna.
services.dsSearchHint: Matched {names} → filtering {districts, plural, one {# district} other {# districts}}.

brand.tagline: Built for Sri Lankans, by Sri Lankans.
brand.taglineShort: Built for Sri Lankans, by Sri Lankans
brand.mission: Sri Lanka's all-in-one civic intelligence platform
brand.builtBy: We believe every Sri Lankan deserves transparent, accessible public data — without visiting dozens of separate websites.

about.title: Mission & data sources
about.subtitle: Open civic intelligence for Sri Lanka — aggregated from public sources with provenance on every metric.
about.missionBody: Lankawa unifies public civic data — economy, disasters, districts, and more — into one accessible platform. We believe Sri Lankans should not need to visit dozens of separate websites to understand their country.
about.freshnessBody: Live metrics show a freshness tier based on when the source was last successfully fetched:
about.freshnessFresh: Fresh — fetched within the expected cadence
about.freshnessStale: Stale — older than expected but still available
about.disclaimerBody: Lankawa aggregates data from public and partner APIs. It is not an official government publication. Always verify critical information with primary sources.
about.apiBody: All data is available via a versioned JSON API with OpenAPI documentation.
about.platformBody: All data, documentation, and source attribution live on Lankawa. You never need to leave this platform to explore metrics, understand methodology, or use the public API.

footer.built: Built for Sri Lankans, by Sri Lankans
footer.copyright: Aggregated from public sources. Not an official government publication.

sources.title: Data Sources
sources.subtitle: Every metric on Lankawa traces back to a registered source with freshness and methodology.

developers.title: Developer API
developers.subtitle: Public read-only endpoints for civic data, freshness, and district profiles — all served from Lankawa.
developers.overviewBody: All endpoints are same-origin JSON APIs. No API key is required for read access. Responses include freshness tiers and internal provenance paths.
developers.healthDescription: Freshness tiers and last-checked timestamps for every registered data source.
developers.pulseDescription: Current exchange rates, fuel prices, flood station counts, and related metrics.
developers.districtsDescription: All 25 Sri Lankan districts with population, area, and province metadata.
developers.districtDescription: Single district profile keyed by slug.
developers.openApiDescription: Machine-readable OpenAPI 3.1 document for the public API.
developers.provenanceBody: Every metric references a source ID and an internal provenance path. Use the sources registry to understand methodology and freshness.
developers.openApiBody: View the full OpenAPI specification rendered inside Lankawa, or fetch the raw JSON from the API.
developers.openApiViewerSubtitle: Machine-readable specification for the Lankawa public API.
developers.electionsDescription: National summary and district-level first-preference results with provenance paths.
developers.provincesDescription: All 9 Sri Lankan provinces with slug and trilingual names.
developers.provinceDescription: Single province profile with aggregated population, area, and district list.
developers.parliamentaryDescription: National seat summary and all electoral district results.
developers.parliamentaryDistrictDescription: Seat allocation for a single electoral district (e.g. colombo, vanni).
developers.servicesDescription: Filter hospitals, schools, and GN offices by district, type, or search query.
developers.serviceDescription: Single public service facility by ID.
developers.floodHistoryDescription: Historical water levels for a river monitoring station with freshness tier.
developers.fuelHistoryDescription: CPC petrol 92 and auto diesel price series from the Octane partner API.
developers.fuelRevisionsDescription: CPC petrol 92 and auto diesel official revision events with price deltas from Octane.
developers.budgetDescription: FY 2024/25 and 2025/26 revenue, expenditure, and sector allocations (seed).
developers.dengueDescription: District-level dengue case counts from the Epidemiology Unit seed dataset.
developers.propertyDescription: District-level median land price bands with low/high ranges.
developers.electionHistoryDescription: Multi-cycle presidential summaries and parliamentary seat history.
developers.localGovernmentDescription: Filter MC, UC, and PS bodies by district, type, or search query.
developers.transportDescription: Bus routes, railway stations, and airports filterable by district.
developers.costOfLivingDescription: District composite index from fuel, property, and food basket seeds.
developers.vehiclesDescription: District median used-vehicle prices, popular makes, and listing counts.
developers.foodDescription: Staple prices, essentials basket, and district meal-cost bands.
developers.lifeDescription: Unified living-cost domain health from the Ariva Life Platform orchestrator.
developers.exportDistrictsDescription: Download simplified district boundaries with provenance metadata, including CSV.
developers.exportElectionsDescription: Download presidential and parliamentary 2024 seed datasets as JSON or CSV.
developers.exportServicesDescription: Download the full public services directory seed as JSON or CSV.
developers.exportFuelHistoryDescription: Download petrol and diesel price history as JSON or CSV.
developers.landChangeDescription: District greenery and built-up indices (2018→2024) with national deltas and top movers.
developers.debtDescription: Commercial vs concessionary external debt share series (2004–2020), normalized for Lankawa.
developers.ncpiDescription: Latest NCPI headline YoY/MoM, core, food/non-food splits, and recent monthly series from DCS.
developers.marketFxDescription: Unofficial community market mid USD→LKR from fawazahmed0 currency-api; null when upstream fails.
developers.worldBankDescription: GDP growth, CPI inflation, and population for LKA from World Bank WDI; null when all indicators fail.
developers.tariffsDescription: Residential electricity energy and fixed charges by consumption block with effective date.
developers.waterBillDescription: Domestic/Samurdhi water tariff slabs with seed estimate and optional live BillCalculator totals.
developers.cseQuotesDescription: Company quotes from cse.lk companyInfoSummery for a comma-separated symbol list, with seed fallback.
developers.exportLandChangeDescription: Download district greenery and built-up indices as JSON or CSV.
developers.exportForeignDebtDescription: Download commercial vs concessionary debt share series as JSON or CSV.
developers.platformStatusDescription: Database connectivity, source freshness counts, API version, and ingest schedule.
developers.pulseHistoryDescription: Stored pulse snapshots for the last 30 days (requires database).
developers.assistantDescription: POST a question; receive an answer grounded on Lankawa API data with citations.
developers.exportBody: Download curated datasets from the Lankawa API — same provenance as in-app data.
developers.embedBody: Same-origin iframe widgets for today, pulse, fuel, and FX — preview and copy embed code on the embed page.
developers.landslideDescription: District watch/warning from lk_dmc tip layout parse, with seed honesty when unavailable.
developers.subscribeDescription: Double opt-in email subscription for the cached morning brief.
developers.webhookBody: HMAC helper ready; outbound delivery not enabled yet. When delivery ships, partners will verify changelog payloads with HMAC-SHA256 (header X-Lankawa-Signature: sha256=<hex>). Helper: signWebhookBody / verifyWebhookSignature in src/lib/webhook-hmac.ts. Set LANKAWA_WEBHOOK_SECRET only once a delivery endpoint is wired.
developers.widgetSdkBody: Beyond iframes — drop-in script scaffold that mounts a same-origin embed. Prefer iframe for production until the npm package ships.

budget.title: National Budget Tracker
budget.subtitle: Revenue, expenditure, and sector allocations — consumer-friendly breakdown of Sri Lanka's national budget.
budget.disclaimer: Seed data aligned with published budget speech totals. Not an official appropriation ledger.

yoy.title: Year-over-year budget
yoy.subtitle: Totals, sector, and ministry deltas beyond the single-year seed breakdown.
yoy.methodology: YoY compares the two most recent fiscal years in the seed ledger. Not an official appropriation series.

health.title: Health Pulse
health.subtitle: Weekly dengue surveillance by district — representative epidemiological patterns.
health.spikeNational: National change {pct}% vs prior week (≥20% threshold).
health.spikeDistrict: {district} at {pct}% WoW — {count, plural, one {# district} other {# districts}} at or above the 20% spike threshold.
health.spikeHonesty: Same threshold as the home dengue_spike alert pin. Not a clinical forecast — verify with Epidemiology Unit reports.
health.districtTableSubtitle: Sorted by case count. Click a district for its full profile.
health.disclaimer: Seed data patterned on Epidemiology Unit weekly reports. Not live surveillance — verify with official health sources for clinical decisions.

moh.title: MoH notices
moh.subtitle: Public health notices with provenance — live MoH RSS when the feed responds.
moh.empty: No MoH notices available right now.
moh.honesty: Not clinical advice. Verify linked Ministry of Health publications before acting.

health.urbanHeatHonesty: Seed LST note for health context. Not a heat-health warning — verify Met Dept / MoH advisories.

compare.title: District Compare

learn.title: How to read Lankawa
learn.subtitle: Plain-language guides to the numbers you see — no jargon, no spin. We explain what we show, where it comes from, and what we do not know.
learn.trustPreamble: Lankawa is not a government agency. These guides explain our methodology so you can decide when to trust a number and when to verify with the primary source.

fxRates.title: How USD/LKR exchange rates work
fxRates.summary: Why Lankawa shows CBSL selling rates, what buy/sell means, and why your bank may differ.
fxRates.inlineHint: The headline USD/LKR figure is the Central Bank selling rate — not every counter or remittance quote.
fxRates.intro: Every morning Sri Lankans check the dollar rate. Lankawa pulls the official daily table from the Central Bank of Sri Lanka (CBSL) and shows the selling rate as the headline number.
fxRates.demoIntro: This is the same shape as the pulse card on Home and Economy — with both buy and sell rates visible.
fxRates.trustNote: We do not predict tomorrow's rate, recommend a money changer, or guarantee that any commercial counter will match CBSL's published table.
sections: CBSL publishes a daily reference table with separate buying and selling rates for the US dollar. Banks and licensed money changers use these as a benchmark, but they may add margins, fees, or inventory limits.

Lankawa's headline USD/LKR value is the CBSL selling rate — the rate at which the central bank would sell dollars to licensed dealers on that business day. The buying rate (shown in the card note) is what dealers receive when selling dollars back.

Rates update on CBSL's business-day schedule, not continuously like a forex trading screen. A Fresh badge means we fetched the latest published table within our expected cadence; Stale means the table is older than expected but still displayed.
If you are remitting, importing, or settling a large invoice, compare the CBSL reference with your bank or exchange counter — Lankawa is a civic reference, not a quote for your transaction.

demo.buyHint: What dealers receive when selling USD to CBSL
demo.footnote: Illustrative values — live numbers appear on Home and Economy.
demo.step3: You verify at your counter if needed

floodLevels.title: What river flood alert levels mean
floodLevels.summary: NORMAL, ALERT, WARNING, and DANGER — how water height maps to station thresholds.
floodLevels.inlineHint: Alert colours reflect river height against station-specific thresholds — not evacuation orders.
floodLevels.intro: Lankawa shows Irrigation Department ArcGIS gauges on the disaster page, and uses lk-flood-api for alert summaries. When lk-flood-api station levels go stale, district lists fall back to the same Irrigation readings. Each station has its own threshold lines.
floodLevels.demoIntro: A station card compares current water level (metres) against alert, warning, and danger thresholds set for that river reach.
floodLevels.trustNote: River gauges are one input for preparedness. They do not replace DMC bulletins, local authority warnings, or on-the-ground judgment during heavy rain.
sections: Water level is measured in metres above a station datum — essentially how high the river is at that gauge point, not how deep floodwater is in your street.
NORMAL means the level is below the station's alert threshold. ALERT means the level crossed the first threshold — increased monitoring, not necessarily public danger.
WARNING and DANGER are progressively higher thresholds for that specific station. A WARNING at one river does not mean the same risk at another — each gauge has different geography.
Remarks and timestamps come from the upstream feed. If history is unavailable, sparklines degrade gracefully — we show what we have and mark freshness honestly.

levels.alert: First threshold crossed — watch forecasts and upstream rain.
levels.warning: Significant rise — prepare according to local guidance.
levels.danger: Highest station threshold — follow DMC and local authority instructions.

freshness.title: How to read freshness badges
freshness.summary: Fresh, Stale, and Down — what each tier means before you act on a number.
freshness.inlineHint: Every live metric carries a freshness tier so stale data is never silent.
freshness.intro: Lankawa compares the last successful fetch time against each source's expected update cadence. Badges appear on pulse cards, source pages, and the status dashboard.
freshness.demoIntro: The badge on a metric tells you how recently we confirmed the upstream source — not whether the underlying event happened.
freshness.trustNote: Fresh does not mean "correct for every use case" — only that the source responded recently. Down means we could not reach the source; we may show a cached or seed fallback elsewhere with clear labelling.
sections: Fresh: the source responded within its expected cadence (for example, CBSL FX within roughly a business day, flood levels within about ten minutes to an hour depending on upstream).
Stale: data is older than expected but still available. Useful for context — verify before time-sensitive decisions.
Down: the adapter failed or the upstream API is unreachable. Check /status for the last error and whether a fallback is in use.
Badges describe our pipeline health, not official urgency levels. A Fresh flood reading can still be alarming; a Stale FX rate may still be the latest CBSL table.

demo.asOf: As of last successful fetch · illustrative

fresh.body: Fetched within the expected cadence for this source.

stale.body: Older than expected — upstream may be delayed or cached.
stale.action: Use for context; verify if timing matters.

down.action: Open /status or the source page before relying on the number.

provenance.title: Where every number comes from
provenance.summary: From pulse card to registered source to upstream publisher — full attribution chain.
provenance.inlineHint: Tap any metric's provenance link to see methodology, cadence, and last fetch time.
provenance.intro: Every metric on Lankawa maps to an entry in our source registry. We document adapter type (API, scheduled scrape, or partner feed), update cadence, and live health.
provenance.demoIntro: Follow the chain from the number you see to the organisation that publishes the underlying data.
provenance.trustNote: We aggregate and normalise — we do not originate official statistics. Election results, budgets, and health surveillance should be confirmed with the publishing authority when used in formal contexts.
sections: Pulse metrics link to /sources/[id] pages with methodology text, adapter type, and freshness history.
API integrations (flood API, Octane fuel, Open-Meteo weather) fetch structured JSON. Scrapes (CBSL FX, CEB power) parse public pages on a schedule.
Partner feeds (PropertyLK, Vehicle platform, Life/Ariva) attempt live calls with honest fallback to seed data when upstream is unavailable — see the seed vs live guide.
The public /api/v1/* JSON API exposes the same provenance paths developers see in the UI — no hidden sources.

demo.previewMetric: USD / LKR · CBSL daily exchange rates

metric.label: On Lankawa
metric.title: Pulse card or module table
metric.body: You see the value, unit, observed time, and a freshness badge.

source.label: Source registry
source.title: /sources/cbsl_fx
source.body: Methodology, cadence, adapter type, and last successful fetch.

upstream.label: Upstream publisher
upstream.title: Central Bank of Sri Lanka
upstream.body: The organisation that originates the data — linked from the source page.

seedVsLive.title: Live data vs illustrative seed
seedVsLive.summary: Which modules fetch live feeds today — and which use representative seed data.
seedVsLive.inlineHint: We label seed and fallback data clearly so approximations are never mistaken for live official series.
seedVsLive.intro: Lankawa ships with both live adapters and curated seed datasets. Seed modules let the platform stay usable while ingest pipelines are built — we document limitations openly in /about and on each module.
seedVsLive.demoIntro: A honest snapshot of what is live today versus representative seed — check /status for current health.
seedVsLive.trustNote: Seed data is never presented as live surveillance or official ledger extracts. When an adapter falls back to seed, freshness and source pages reflect that.
sections: Live today: CBSL FX, Octane fuel, lk-flood-api levels, Open-Meteo weather, CEB power checks, CSE market board (with cache), and news RSS — subject to upstream availability.
Representative seed: dengue weekly tables, MP scorecards, tender notices, local government directory completeness, historical election approximations, and cost-of-living composites.
Mixed: property and vehicle modules attempt partner API calls but fall back to seed bands when upstream errors — watch freshness and source notes on those pages.
We expand live coverage as adapters stay green for 30+ days — see docs/ROADMAP.md. If a module matters to you, /status shows whether it is actually live right now.

demo.liveBody: Fetched from an upstream API or scheduled scrape on a public cadence. Freshness badges apply.
demo.seedBody: Curated sample aligned with published formats — useful for UI and demos, not operational response.

fx.name: USD / LKR
fx.note: CBSL daily table via scrape + DB ingest

dengue.name: Dengue cases
dengue.note: Representative weekly seed — not live surveillance

property.name: Property medians
property.note: Partner API when healthy; seed bands otherwise

tenders.name: Tender feed
tenders.note: Static seed notices — not live e-GP

costOfLivingMethodology.title: Cost of living methodology
costOfLivingMethodology.subtitle: How Lankawa builds the district composite index — and what it is not.
costOfLivingMethodology.inputProperty: PropertyLK district median land bands, Colombo-normalized for the property component.
costOfLivingMethodology.inputFood: FoodLK or Ariva Life essentials basket when available; otherwise seed food basket estimates.
costOfLivingMethodology.inputCoconut: Coconut is extracted from the food staple items as a visible COL food signal, with live, wfp_hdx, life_federation, or seed provenance.
costOfLivingMethodology.methodBody: When live federation inputs are available, Lankawa refreshes the national petrol reference and rescales district food baskets from the essentials estimate. Property components use live PropertyLK medians relative to Colombo. The Coconut Index surfaces the coconut staple price used by the food signal. District ranks come from a blended index (seed structure + live components). If partners are offline, the published seed snapshot is shown with seed provenance.
costOfLivingMethodology.limitsBody: This is not official NCPI, CCPI, or Department of Census and Statistics HIES data. It is a civic comparison tool with provenance badges. Do not use it for wage setting or formal inflation claims.

homeDistrict.title: Your district
homeDistrict.subtitle: Pin a home district for faster morning checks — saved on this device only.

landChange.title: Land Change Pulse
landChange.subtitle: District greenery and built-up change since 2018 — a morning-sized land signal, not a satellite gallery.
landChange.attribution: Lankawa indices are our own district aggregation for civic pulse use. Research prior art: Team Watchdog satellite2024 (MIT). Not official Survey Department land use — do not treat as legal zoning.
landChange.districtSubtitle: Greenery, built-up, and weekly NDVI anomaly for this district.
landChange.ndviHint: Negative = greenery stress vs seasonal baseline (ETL-curated)
landChange.chartSkipped: Land chart skipped in Data Saver.
landChange.yearCompareSubtitle: Toggle 2018 ↔ 2024 for greenery or built-up index rankings.
landChange.yearCompareHonesty: Interactive seed indices — not Survey Department land use.

landChangeMethodology.title: Land Change Pulse methodology
landChangeMethodology.subtitle: How Lankawa turns land-cover research into a district morning check — without hosting satellite mosaics.
landChangeMethodology.whatBody: Each district has a greenery index and a built-up index on a 0–100 scale for 2018 and 2024. Deltas are point changes over that window. Numbers are sized for civic pulse use (compare with AQI or flood status), not cadastral mapping.
landChangeMethodology.watchdogTitle: What Team Watchdog does — and what we do instead
landChangeMethodology.watchdogBody: Team Watchdog’s satellite2024 project publishes annual Sentinel-2 mosaics and land-cover grids for journalism and research. That work is excellent prior art under MIT licence. Lankawa’s job is different: a daily, trilingual product with freshness provenance.
landChangeMethodology.watchdogPoint1: We do not host multi‑GB mosaics or Drive folders inside the app.
landChangeMethodology.watchdogPoint2: We ship small district JSON, an API, CSV export, and district-page cards.
landChangeMethodology.watchdogPoint3: We credit Watchdog as research inspiration; our indices are Lankawa’s civic aggregation until a year‑2 ETL writes observations from LULC grids.
landChangeMethodology.honestyBody: This series is curated / seed until Lankawa runs its own yearly land-cover ETL. It is not Survey Department land use, not zoning, and not a live sensor feed. Treat it like other Lankawa seed pulses: useful context with clear provenance.
landChangeMethodology.apiBody: Machine-readable access uses the same shape as other Lankawa civic endpoints.

alertPins.title: Alert pins
alertPins.subtitle: Pin what you care about — saved on this device. Your alerts appear when a signal fires.
alertPins.firedSubtitle: Pinned signals that are active against this morning’s pulse.

alertPins.help_fx_move: Fire on large USD/LKR day moves or unusual MAD/z spikes
alertPins.help_flood: Fire when river stations report elevated alert levels
alertPins.help_power: Fire on CEB outage or scheduled interruption
alertPins.help_met: Fire when Met Dept yellow/amber/red advisories are active
alertPins.help_landslide: Fire when highland districts show landslide watch/warning
alertPins.help_flood_rising: Fire when elevated river gauges rise quickly (≥ ~5 cm/h)
alertPins.help_fire: Fire when NASA FIRMS detects active fires in Sri Lanka
alertPins.help_gdacs: Fire on Orange/Red GDACS events in the regional window
alertPins.help_fuel_revision: Fire when the latest CPC fuel revision falls within the last 10 days
alertPins.help_met_flood: Fire when a Met warning coincides with elevated or rising flood gauges
alertPins.help_dengue_spike: Fire when any district or national dengue WoW change is ≥ 20%
alertPins.help_cse_move: Fire when ASPI absolute session change is ≥ 1%
alertPins.help_col_basket: Fire when a tracked fuel price day-delta is ≥ 5 LKR/L
alertPins.help_news_cluster: Fire when a headline cluster spans 3 or more outlets
alertPins.help_tender_closing: Fire when e-GP tenders close within 7 days
alertPins.help_card_day: Fire when at least one supermarket card offer is active today (live or seed)
